caption: The video captures a live event, likely a community gathering or a small concert, taking place in a room with wooden blinds covering the windows. A man is seated on stage to the right, playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. He appears to be adjusting his glasses with one hand while strumming the guitar with the other. To his left, another person is seated at a podium, possibly reading or speaking, though their role is not entirely clear. The audience, consisting of people of various ages, is seated in rows of chairs, attentively watching the performers. The atmosphere seems relaxed and intimate, suggesting a casual yet engaging event. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, indicating the possible affiliation or sponsorship of the event.
